diagrams.title: Cache Memory Organization
diagrams.description: Shows how a CPU address is divided into tag, index, and offset fields for cache lookup
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how cache determines hit/miss and accesses data

diagrams.title: Cache Miss Types Classification
diagrams.description: Hierarchy of cache miss types showing compulsory, capacity, and conflict misses
diagrams.purpose: Identifying causes of cache misses and optimization strategies

diagrams.title: Multi-Level Cache Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows CPU connected to L1, L2 caches and main memory with typical access times
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multi-level caches work together to reduce access time

diagrams.title: Write Policy Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares write-through and write-back policies with data flow paths
diagrams.purpose: Understanding trade-offs between consistency and performance
